summary: Presentation/attract screens: title 'Press Start', Kronos logo, attract/demo mode (8 char matchups), win/result screens (P1/P2/alt), 'The End' credits, Demispk demo text. Separate from menu.c (options/intros) and match.c (match flow).
subsystems: Title: Press Start sequence with fade-in, cursor bounce
Kronos logo animation with SFX timing table
Attract/demo: cycles 8 character matchups, AI vs AI playback
Win results: P1/P2 branching result screens with framexSFX tables
The End: credits screen fade-in/text scroll
open_questions: Relationship with menu.c — what parts overlap vs complement?
